review.reviewBody: The cheat sheet saved me over 8 hours in my first week. The AI workflows are practical and well-documented.
Bought this and the template pack. Best investment I've made on my side hustle setup. The templates are immediately usable.
Great starter resource for anyone building an AI-based digital product business. Could use more advanced topics but perfect for beginners.

acceptedAnswer.text: All products are downloadable PDF files. The template pack includes additional Notion workspace links and Google Sheets.

mainEntity.name: How do I receive my purchase?

acceptedAnswer.text: Instant download after payment. The PDF is delivered immediately through a secure download link.

mainEntity.name: Is the cheat sheet worth the price?

acceptedAnswer.text: Each workflow saves about 10 minutes. 50 workflows means 500 minutes saved. At $47 you pay less than a dollar per workflow.
Contact us directly and we will work it out. 30-day money-back guarantee.

mainEntity.name: Do I need any technical skills to use these?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Everything is designed for beginners. The workflows are copy-paste ready, and templates come with step-by-step instructions. If you can use a web browser, you can use these products.
All products receive free lifetime updates. When we update content, you get an email with the new download link. No need to repurchase.

mainEntity.name: Can I use these for my own clients or business?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. These are personal and commercial use licenses. You can apply the workflows and templates to your own projects and client work. Individual resale rights are not included.

mainEntity.name: How soon will I see results?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most solopreneurs complete their first product within a week using our templates and frameworks. The 90-day action plan in the Premium version gives you a week-by-week roadmap to $10k/month.

mainEntity.name: What payment methods do you accept?

acceptedAnswer.text: We accept all major payment methods through PayPal -- credit/debit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal balance. No PayPal account required to check out.

mainEntity.name: Is there support if I get stuck?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Email us anytime at support@digitalpedia.co and we typically respond within 24 hours. Premium users get priority support.
